title: 6 High-Yield Blue-Chips You'll Want To Own When The Market Crashes Again
text: The market was up 9% in July, the best month since November 2020. The rally was mostly based on the delusional belief the Fed will soon pivot. Some economist models think CPI might not peak until early next year at 10.1%. The Fed's most dovish President has said no pivot is coming anytime soon.
